hero.title: Mohamed Rayen Chati
hero.subtitle: Software Engineering Student
hero.description: I build modern web applications and I enjoy working with React, Java, C++ and SQL. Welcome to my personal portfolio website.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am an Informatics student at FH Aachen with a strong focus on frontend development. I enjoy building modern, responsive, and user-friendly interfaces, with attention to performance and clean design. I work mainly with React, JavaScript, and CSS, and I am continuously improving my skills to create intuitive and high-quality user experiences.
about.projects: I work on different modern software projects.
about.goals: My goal is to become a strong full-stack developer.
